decisionText: Proceed with multi-model deliberation pipeline for research validation. Implementation should prioritize evidence discovery improvements and cost analysis before production deployment.
whyGood: Multi-model architecture provides robustness against individual model biases
Pipeline correctly identifies evidence gaps and blocks decisions when quality floor not met
Schema validation salvages malformed model output instead of crashing
whyBad: Current mock search adapter returns no evidence, limiting realistic testing
Evidence discovery recall needs improvement before real-world deployment
knownWeaknesses: Scalability under concurrent load not tested
No cost analysis for multi-model deployment
unresolvedRisks: Evidence quality floor prevents decision when insufficient evidence found
reopenConditions: New evidence becomes available that changes the evidence quality ratio
A model identifies a critical flaw missed in initial review
nextActions: Implement cost analysis for multi-model deployment
Run load testing for concurrent research scenarios
